seed.content:
Three disciplines, one philosophy.

Every space we touch is guided by the same principle: remove what is unnecessary, and let what remains breathe.

Residential Design

Private homes and apartments designed around the rhythms of daily life. We work with natural light, proportion, and honest materials.

Workspace Design

Studios, offices, and creative environments optimized for sustained focus. Calibrated acoustics, considered sightlines, grounding materiality.

Material Sourcing

Curated natural materials sourced directly from artisans and mills. Hinoki cypress, white oak, ceramic, washed linen, natural stone.
